# RiftLite

> RiftLite is a free Windows desktop companion app for Riftbound. It fully automatically tracks every match you play on TCGA and RiftAtlas, saves visual replays for review, surfaces your matchup stats, and includes a streamer overlay for OBS. The website hosts download links, the community meta, matchup matrix, deck stats, guides, and news.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.riftlite.com/): Overview and download CTA.
- [Download](https://www.riftlite.com/download): Get the Windows desktop app. Free, no account required.
- [Guide](https://www.riftlite.com/guide): How to install and use RiftLite.
- [News](https://www.riftlite.com/news): Patch notes and release announcements.
- [About](https://www.riftlite.com/about): What RiftLite is and who makes it.

## Community data

- [Meta](https://www.riftlite.com/community/meta): Deck archetype play rate and win rate.
- [Matchup matrix](https://www.riftlite.com/community/matrix): Deck-vs-deck win rates.
- [Matches](https://www.riftlite.com/community/matches): Recent community matches.
- [Decks](https://www.riftlite.com/community/decks): Deck list and stats.
- [Deck compare](https://www.riftlite.com/community/decks/compare): Compare two decks head-to-head.

## Features of the desktop app

- Fully automatic match tracking on TCGA and RiftAtlas — no buttons to press.
- Turn-by-turn visual replay viewer with saved frames and timeline controls.
- Streamer overlay for OBS (new in 0.47).
- Personal matchup matrix with going-first splits.
- Piltover Archive deck import with per-match snapshots.
- Community meta and matrix all accessible in-app.
